cards.front: What is the maximum length of a file name in Unix?
What is the purpose of the dot (.) at the beginning of a file name in Unix?
cards.back: Hides the file from the directory listing

cards.front: What is the purpose of the tilde (~) in a Unix file name?
What is the difference between a file name and a directory name?
cards.back: A file name is the name of a single file, while a directory name is the name of a folder containing multiple files

cards.front: What is the purpose of the Unix 'find' command?
cards.back: To search for files based on various criteria such as name, size, and location
